CONTAINS 2% OR LESS OF SALT, TOMATO POWDER, MONOSODIUM GLUTAMATE, ONION POWDER, GARLIC POWDER, SPICE, HYDROLYZED CORN PROTEIN, MALTED BARLEY FLOUR, YEAST EXTRACT, MALIC ACID, CITRIC ACID, PAPRIKA EXTRACT COLOR, DISODIUM INOSINATE, DISODIUM GUANYLATE, NATURAL FLAVOR, WHEY, WHEAT STARCH.
